Imphal vide letter No. 5-15/20 7-CAU dated 13th December. 2007. Now with the approval of Central Government, 1, S.N. Puri, Vice-Chancellor, Central Agricultural University in exercise of powers conferred under section 27(2) of CAU Act, 1992 (No. 40 of 1992) do hereby make amendments in Ordinance No. 2 of 1995 amending the qualification and experience for the posts of Livestock/Farm Assistant, FieId-curn:Laboratory Assistants and for differentYosts in Central Agricultural University as mentioned in Appendix. (S.N. Puri) Vice-Chancellor -- 5 of 5 --
